This fork is intentionally narrow. General product ideas should usually go upstream first. Use this template for local macOS usability, build, privacy, or fork-maintenance ideas.

## Upstream or fork-specific?

## Privacy or security impact

Would this send data to a new service, store more local data, or change how API keys are handled?
